Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wolf Division]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Wolf Division contains many destructive powers that are not public record.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Wolf Division is an Abidan division.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Wolf Division is one of the Abidan divisions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Jek’nan has no reason to fear the Wolf Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Wolf Division is a combat-oriented Abidan division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Wolf Division is a training compound containing hundreds of recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Wolf Division is an Abidan division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Wolf Division had a device that materializes items.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
